0010110111111100 0100110100100100 0 -> sum: 0111101100100000, cout: 0
1000011000100000 1001001100110010 1 -> sum: 0001100101010011, cout: 1
0110100000011110 1010111000101000 1 -> sum: 0001011001000111, cout: 1
1100110110000101 1010111111101001 0 -> sum: 0111110101101110, cout: 1

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
